_meta.source: Hanoi University of Science and Technology (HUST) & Ministry of Agriculture and Environment, 2024 Grid Emission Factor Study
_meta.notes: Vietnam 2024 grid emission factor: 0.681 tCO2e/MWh (3.2% increase from 2023 due to 17.7% surge in coal output, 49.5% of mix). Converted to lb CO2/kWh for REopt: 0.681 tCO2e/MWh × 2204.62 lb/t ÷ 1000 kWh/MWh = 1.5013 lb CO2/kWh. Used as constant 8760 series (no hourly dispatch shape available).

historical_context.notes: For reference only — not used by the tool. Shows trend for calibration.

data.update_schedule: Published annually by HUST/MONRE, typically Q1-Q2 of the following year. Next expected: Q1 2026 for 2025 data.
